metadata.title: Project Task Board
preamble: Before starting any ticket, complete coord/AGENT_STARTUP_CHECKLIST.md.
Replace the example tickets below with your project work.
Repo codes are defined in coord/project.config.js. Use X for cross-repo / coordination work.

sections.heading: Getting Started
body: This is a starter board. Replace these example rows with real tickets.
Each ticket flows todo -> doing -> review -> done via coord/scripts/gov.
From a scaffolded app root, run `npm run coord-ui` to open the read-only cockpit for this board.

rows.Description: Configure coord/project.config.js with your repo map and populate the coord/product/ specification stubs.
Example backend ticket. Replace with your first real unit of work.
